{{Infobox location
| name = Ghostwind Hall
| introduced = Waybound
}}

''See also: [[Ghostwind Hall Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ghostwind]] Hall is a residence and sanctuary established by [[Lindon]], [[Yerin]], and their companions to serve as a base of operations while they face external conflicts. The structure is situated within a pocket world characterized by an [[island]] of pale stone and a sky filled with swirling colors. While many of the original facilities in this realm were incomplete or of little value, some remain functional for the group. The interior includes various spaces such as a sparring hall and large caverns used for training, as well as a significant room located at the summit of [[Windfall]]. [[Lindon]] utilized the [[Void Icon]] to restore the house, and the location features marble flooring. The hall is subject to environmental shifts, such as trembling when restrictions are removed or changes in time flow that affect how occupants enter the space.}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ghostwind]] Hall is a location that [[Lindon]] recently completed working on and where he later materialized. The hall serves as a residence for [[Orthos]], who has spent months within its walls, and the sounds of his training can be heard from within. The facility features a cycling room used by [[Yerin]] for her practice and is accessible through a portal located inside a doorway. During one instance, the air within the hall boiled when an alarm sounded, and [[Mercy]] eventually strode back into the space where [[Yerin]] was present.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ghostwind Hall]] is a location [[Lindon]] recently finished working on.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ghostwind Hall]] is a location where [[Lindon]] materialized.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Orthos]] has spent months inside [[Ghostwind Hall]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ghostwind Hall]] contains a cycling room where [[Yerin]] practices.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ghostwind Hall]] is a location where [[Orthos]]' training can be heard.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ghostwind Hall]] is a location where the air boiled when an alarm sounded.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ghostwind Hall]] is a location accessible via a portal inside a doorway.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] strode back into [[Ghostwind Hall]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] was in [[Ghostwind Hall]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
